goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: reject_downstream。1044問のcoverageと安全性は妥当だが、二者ともtargetの151問中exact一致は1問だけだった。意味判定と数値offset計算をGPTへ同時要求する現方式をやめ、serverが候補span・boundary IDを機械生成し、二者はIDだけを選ぶ資格共通方式へ先に変更する。
evidence: Four-way coverage is target 1, non_target 309, hold 390, invalid 344 for all 1044 questions.
All 1044 checkpoints have exactly two resolved distinct-thread gpt-5.5/high prompt-v2 reviews and one validation attempt.
Target plus target occurred for 151 questions: invalid_review 125, span disagreement 25, exact target 1.
Invalid review failures were dominated by outside-range offsets and ordered/non-overlapping violations.
The one target is an exact four-span source slice with reproducible keys and boolean calculation flag.
00_source remained unchanged and Firestore was not invoked.
blocked_tasks: Downstream correctness, explanation, question set, publish gate, and Firestore publication
missing_evidence: Candidate and boundary ID contract canary
Fresh 1044-question rerun under the new contract
